description: Every offbeat roadside attraction on RoadsideAmerica.com — with a local SQLite cache, offline search, and superlative categories no other tool offers.

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.value: roadside-america-pp-cli/0.1.0 (user-initiated roadside-attraction lookup; polite, cached, rate-limited)

tools.name: raw_by-state
tools.description: Raw attraction links for a US/Canada state (HTML fragment). Required: state.

params.name: state
params.description: Two-letter state or province code, e.g. TX, CA, ON

tools.name: raw_detail
tools.description: Raw attraction detail page (HTML). Required: id.

tools.name: raw_nearby
tools.description: Raw nearby attraction links for coordinates (HTML fragment). Required: long, lat. Optional: delta (default: 0.5), id (default: 0).
